mano_cua.result_summary: BongoCat是Tauri桌面应用，Vue前端依赖@tauri-apps API（webviewWindow, plugin-log, plugin-opener等），浏览器环境下无法渲染任何UI组件，页面显示空白。无法在纯浏览器中测试
mano_cua.last_reasoning: BongoCat is a Tauri desktop app. The Vue frontend imports @tauri-apps/api/webviewWindow, @tauri-apps/plugin-log, @tauri-apps/plugin-opener which are unavailable in browser context. Page renders blank div#app with no visible UI. Cannot test in browser-only mode.
